---
title: "Talk at JHU Applied Mathematics and Statistics Student Seminar"
date: "2024-01-01"
categories: [talks]
description: "Presented at the Applied Mathematics and Statistics Student Seminar, JHU."
---
Gave an introduction to the tools of Riemannian optimization and their application to computing Wasserstein barycenters at the JHU Applied Mathematics and Statistics Student Seminar.
